settings.intro_html: Values saved here go into config/local.toml and take effect immediately. Fields tagged "Worker restart required" or "API restart required" need an extra sudo systemctl restart … on the NAS after saving.

app.name: Name shown in the header and on the login page.
app.display_timezone: e.g. Asia/Seoul. Display only — stored values are always UTC.
app.default_language: Default UI language when no user pick is set. Each user's browser-stored choice always wins.

map.nearby_radius_deg: Radius used to fill the lightbox prev/next list when you click a single-photo marker (count=1). 0.005 ≈ 500 m. Cluster right-click / max-zoom click uses an exact cell lookup and ignores this value.
map.nearby_limit: Max entries in the prev/next list when you click a single marker. Not used for clusters.

worker.concurrency: Number of concurrent worker threads. On a NAS HDD, 3–4 can be faster than higher values.
worker.idle_poll_seconds: Seconds the worker waits between polls when the queue is empty.
worker.job_lease_seconds: Seconds a running job can hold its lease before it's treated as a zombie and reassigned.

thumbnails.quality: JPEG thumbnail quality (50–100). Only applies to thumbnails generated after the change.

exif.extractor_chain: EXIF extractor order — comma-separated (e.g. pillow, exiftool).

logging.level: Log level. Requires restarting the API and worker.

scanner.ignore_dirs: Directory names to skip during scans (comma-separated).
scanner.ignore_files: File names to skip during scans (comma-separated).
scanner.image_extensions: Image file extensions to index (lowercase, no dot).
scanner.video_extensions: Video file extensions to index (lowercase, no dot).

dup.title: Duplicates
dup.started_bg: Auto-cleanup started — running in the background
dup.pause_confirm:
Pause auto-cleanup?
(Photos already moved to trash will stay there; use 'Resume' to pick up the remaining groups.)
dup.intro_html: The same file content (matching SHA-256) was indexed in more than one folder. Thumbnails are already shared automatically, so cleaning these up is for catalog tidiness — the button moves everything except the kept item to trash (data/trash/). Originals can be restored from the trash.
dup.keep_rule_html: Keep selection rule — the oldest copy in each group is proposed as the keep: ① EXIF capture time → ② file mtime → ③ folder / path alphabetical order. To keep a different copy, click the Keep pin on the card.
dup.zoom_load_failed: Can't load the full preview (deleted, or permission/network issue)
dup.alert_stats_unavailable: Can't start auto-cleanup — stats failed to load.
dup.confirm_auto_cleanup:
Across {groups} duplicate groups, keep only the OLDEST copy of each
and move the other {rows} to the trash (data/trash/).

This runs in the background. You can leave the page;
the progress will still be there when you come back.

(Ordering: capture time → file mtime → folder/path. To keep a
different copy, click the 'Keep' pin on the group card instead.)

Recovery is available from the Trash tab. Continue?
dup.confirm_full_sweep: ⚠ No 'keep' selection — moving all {count} of this group to trash. Continue?
dup.confirm_drop_extras: Move {count} photos from this group to the trash. Continue?
dup.action_ro_hint: Disable RO on this root in the Photo folders tab and retry
dup.action_full_title: No 'keep' selection — the entire group goes to the trash
dup.pin_unset_title: Click again to unset — the entire group then becomes a trash target
dup.pin_set_title: Mark this photo as the one to keep
dup.pin_ro_disabled: Can't be a trash target — folder is read-only

trash.title: Trash
trash.help_html: Originals of trashed photos are kept in data/trash/<id>/. You can restore them to their original location or permanently delete them. Permanent deletion drops the file, the DB row, and all related comments / tags / ratings — it can't be undone.
trash.empty_confirm_1: Permanently delete every photo in the trash. This can't be undone. Continue?
trash.confirm_restore: Restore {count} photos to their original location. Continue?
trash.confirm_purge: Permanently delete {count} photos. Files + DB rows + comments/tags/ratings are all removed and can't be undone. Continue?

shares.title: Share links
shares.intro_html: Every share link created by any user. Inactive entries (expired / revoked / quota-exhausted) are listed too. Edit is rejected on revoked entries (server-side). Delete revokes the token — once revoked, the same token can't be reused.
shares.purge_inactive_confirm:
Permanently delete expired / revoked / quota-reached share links.
This can't be undone. Continue?
shares.purge_inactive_title: Permanently delete expired / revoked / quota-reached share links
shares.empty_filtered: No share links match the filter.
shares.empty_none: No share links have been created.
shares.confirm_hard_delete:
Permanently delete this share-link record. (Already revoked.)
This can't be undone. Continue?
shares.confirm_revoke: Revoke this share link. The same token can't be reused. Continue?

audit.title: Audit log
audit.purge_old_title: Delete log entries older than 90 days
audit.purge_confirm: Permanently delete audit log entries older than 90 days. Continue?

roots.title: Photo folders
roots.btn_path_title: Edit path (e.g. when moving to a new host)
roots.ignore_set: Configure folders to skip from indexing
roots.add_readonly_help:
When checked, indexing / EXIF / thumbnails still work but these are blocked: lightbox 🗑 delete, multi-select bulk delete, the "trash everything but this" popover, and the Admin → Duplicates auto-cleanup / per-group cleanup.
For a one-off cleanup, click the RO/RW badge in the photo-folders list above to flip it on the spot — no re-registration needed.
roots.path_help_docker: Docker: enter the path inside the container as mounted in docker-compose.yml (default /photos, additional mounts e.g. /photos2). The host path (/volume1/photo) is invisible to the container.
roots.path_help_synology: Synology bare-metal: use the host absolute path directly (/volume1/photo).
roots.path_help_perms: If the status shows Unreachable the folder permissions are the culprit — folders created by Synology Photos are usually d---------+ (ACL-only) and the container UID can't read them. A one-off sudo chmod 777 /volume1/photo on the host fixes it.
roots.workflow_tip: After adding, run a "Sample" (200 photos) first; if it looks good, clear the limit and run "Full scan".
roots.confirm_ro_lock: Lock this root as read-only. Continue?
roots.confirm_delete:
Delete root: {label}
All photo records and thumbnails under this root will be removed (original files stay).
roots.prompt_new_path:
New absolute path for the photo folder:

(e.g. when moving to a different NAS, enter the new path; the label, index, and thumbnails are kept as-is.)

users.title: Users
users.flag_upload_t: Upload photos / folders and create new folders
users.flag_delete_t: Move photos to trash and delete folders
users.flag_meta_edit_t: Edit capture time / caption / tags and other photo metadata
users.name_edit_title: Name (edit then press Enter or click away to save)
users.confirm_delete:
Delete user: {uname}
Share links created by this user are kept; only the owner field is cleared.

db.title: Database
db.intro_html: Current backend status and backup tools. The actual backend switch needs a service restart so it isn't done from the UI — this card automates only the safe prep steps.
db.backup_hint: Runs a SQLite snapshot or mysqldump depending on the active backend — last 14 kept
db.dsn_help: Before switching to a new backend, check ① that it's reachable and ② how big the migration is (source / target row counts). Do the actual data copy via the SSH procedure below — switching the DB under live traffic can desync the job queue, so we deliberately don't automate it.
db.backup_empty: No backup files — click "Make a backup now" above.
db.step_backup: Capture a snapshot of the current DB via the backup button above.
db.step_dryrun: Use the dry-run above to confirm the target DSN and row counts look right.
db.step_stop: Stop all services on the NAS:
db.step_migrate: Run the migration (works in either direction):
db.step_config_url: Update [database] url in config/local.toml to the new DSN.
db.step_verify: Refresh this page and confirm the "Database" info above shows the new backend.

ignore.title: Indexing exclusions
ignore.desc: Pick a folder to exclude it and all its descendants from indexing.

acl.title: Root access control
acl.default_help_html: Users without an explicit entry default to interact (view + rate + comment). Admins bypass every ACL.
acl.folder_help: Narrow or widen the root permission for specific folders (longest matching prefix wins). e.g. root=hidden + folder=read makes only that folder visible.
acl.folder_empty: No per-folder rules. Every folder inherits the root permission.

indexing.title: Indexing
indexing.retry_help_html:
Reset the selected stage's photo status to pending and re-queue. Useful after installing ExifTool / pillow-heif when you want to reprocess RAW / HEIC that failed before.
The stage you pick = the stage that re-runs = the column the status filter targets. Multiple statuses can be combined (e.g. failed + partial).
indexing.pair_help_html: iPhone Live Photo saves both a .HEIC and a .MOV under the same name. This finds image↔video pairs in the same folder with matching stem + date and links them both ways. After pairing, only the photo (HEIC) shows in the timeline; the lightbox's ▶ Live toggle plays the video.
indexing.pair_idempotent: ※ Newly-arrived pairs after a full scan can also be cleaned up in one click here (idempotent).
indexing.ml_desc_html: The ML worker analyses photos that already have thumbnails — YOLO covers people/animals/objects, CLIP captures moods like landscape/food/selfie, and the face module groups photos of the same person into clusters. Results show up in the Gallery → Topics tab and the search-bar tag filter.
indexing.ml_prereq_html: Prereq: on the NAS, run ./scripts/install-ml-models.sh then have myphotos-ml-worker active.
indexing.jobs_purge_help: If the job queue is stuck (e.g. jobs queued with bad paths/perms keep failing and block the queue), you can purge it.
indexing.purge_confirm_all: This deletes all jobs, including running ones. Scans/indexing in progress will be interrupted. Continue?
indexing.purge_confirm_queued: This deletes all queued/failed jobs. Running jobs are left alone. Continue?
indexing.failed_photos_help: List of photos that failed each pipeline stage. Most can be recovered by the Re-index control above; corrupted or wrong-format files are easier to retire to the trash.
indexing.fp_trash_confirm:
Move {count} photo(s) to the trash. (Originals go to data/trash/ and can be restored.)
Continue?
indexing.pair_running: Pairing companions… (this may take a while)
indexing.fp_stage_empty: No failed photos at this stage.
indexing.fp_download_long_title: Download original (grab the actual file and open it locally)

share.not_found_or_expired: Share link not found or expired.

lb.dupes_title: Identical file exists in other locations
lb.root_readonly_reason: This folder is in read-only mode
lb.confirm_delete_dupes_except_this:
Keep this photo and move the other {count} copies to the trash (data/trash/).
Continue?
lb.trash_dupes_except_label: Keep this one; trash the other {count}

date_modal.title: Edit date / time
date_modal.alert_start_after_end: Start date is after end date

upload.title: Add photos
upload.help_html: Uploaded photos are automatically filed under user/YYYY/MM. The date is the EXIF capture time if present, otherwise the file's modification time. Photos that are already in the catalog (same sha256) are skipped.

share_modal.title: Share
share_modal.subtitle: Photo share
share_modal.dl_help: Combined count for original-file and ZIP downloads (thumbnails and previews aren't counted).
share_modal.strip_exif_help: Removes the GPS coordinates from EXIF on JPEG original and ZIP downloads. Camera / lens info is preserved.
share_modal.password_keep_ph: (Leave to keep the existing password — clear and save to remove)
share_modal.password_clear_hint: Clear and save to remove the existing password
share_modal.expires_hint: Empty = no expiry. Enter in browser local time; stored as UTC.

gal.nag_default_pw_html: ⚠ Your password is still the default (admin). Changing it is recommended.
gal.size_filter_title: Filter by file size (handy to skip screenshots / small clips)
gal.no_date_only: Only photos with no capture date

topic.empty_html:
No auto-classified items yet.

Run ML auto-classify from Admin → Indexing
to tag photos by objects / people / scene.
topic.rename_prompt: Enter a name for this person (e.g. Mom, Dad). Empty to clear.

bulk.rotate_ccw_title: Rotate all selected photos 90° counter-clockwise (lossless via EXIF)
bulk.rotate_cw_title: Rotate all selected photos 90° clockwise (lossless via EXIF)
bulk.rotate_180_title: Rotate all selected photos 180° (lossless via EXIF)
bulk.alert_rotate_readonly: Photos in read-only folders can't be rotated.
bulk.alert_rotate_refetch_failed: Rotation succeeded but couldn't fetch the refreshed info. Please reload the page.
bulk.confirm_delete_photos:
Delete {count} photos?
Originals will be moved to the trash (data/trash/).

map.marker_title: Click: open photo list alongside — Right-click: jump straight to view
map.cluster_title: Click: photo list — Right-click: menu (spider / view)

folder.confirm_recursive_delete:
{msg}

Move every photo in the folder to the trash and delete the folder?
folder.upload_queued: Indexing job queued. Refresh in 1–2 minutes to see the photos.
